name: Sweet Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, salt, cream of tartar, baking soda, and cinnamon.
2. In another bowl, beat the butter until softened.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, along with milk and vanilla extract.
4. Mix until all the flour is moistened, then beat for an additional 2 minutes at medium speed.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Pour batter into a prepared bundt or tube pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C) for 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Let the cake cool in the pan for 15 minutes before removing it from the pan and placing it on a rack to complete cooling.
9. For the glaze, melt semi-sweet chocolate with butter, stirring constantly.
10. Allow the glaze to cool slightly, then drizzle over the top of the cooled cake using the tip of a spoon.
